# Filters

- ✅ Parity: 60
- ☑️ Mock: 3
- Unsupported: 83
- **Total:** 146

| Filter                         | Status      |                                                                                | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------------------------------ | ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `abs`                          | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/abs)                          | Returns the absolute value of a number.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `append`                       | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/append)                       | Adds a given string to the end of a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `asset_img_url`                | ☑️ Assay    | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/asset_img_url)                | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for an image in the [`assets` directory](/themes/architecture#assets) of a theme.                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `asset_url`                    | ✅ Assay    | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/asset_url)                    | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for a file in the [`assets` directory](/themes/architecture#assets) of a theme.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `at_least`                     | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/at_least)                     | Limits a number to a minimum value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `at_most`                      | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/at_most)                      | Limits a number to a maximum value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `avatar`                       |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/avatar)                       | Generates HTML to render a customer's avatar, if available.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `base64_decode`                | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/base64_decode)                | Decodes a string in [Base64 format](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Base64).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `base64_encode`                | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/base64_encode)                | Encodes a string to [Base64 format](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Base64).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `base64_url_safe_decode`       |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/base64_url_safe_decode)       | Decodes a string in URL-safe [Base64 format](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Base64).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `base64_url_safe_encode`       |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/base64_url_safe_encode)       | Encodes a string to URL-safe [Base64 format](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Base64).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `blake3`                       |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/blake3)                       | Converts a string into a Blake3 hash.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `brightness_difference`        |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/brightness_difference)        | Calculates the [perceived brightness difference](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/WD-AERT/#color-contrast) between two colors.                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `camelize`                     |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/camelize)                     | Converts a string to CamelCase.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `capitalize`                   | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/capitalize)                   | Capitalizes the first word in a string and downcases the remaining characters.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `ceil`                         | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/ceil)                         | Rounds a number up to the nearest integer.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `color_brightness`             |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/color_brightness)             | Calculates the [perceived brightness](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/WD-AERT/#color-contrast) of a given color.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `color_contrast`               |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/color_contrast)               | Calculates the contrast ratio between two colors and returns the ratio's numerator. The ratio's denominator, which isn't returned, is always 1. For example, with a contrast ratio of 3.5:1, this filter returns 3.5.                                                                                                                                 |
| `color_darken`                 |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/color_darken)                 | Darkens a given color by a specific percentage. The percentage must be between 0 and 100.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `color_desaturate`             |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/color_desaturate)             | Desaturates a given color by a specific percentage. The percentage must be between 0 and 100.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `color_difference`             |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/color_difference)             | Calculates the [color difference](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/WD-AERT/#color-contrast) between two colors.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `color_extract`                |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/color_extract)                | Extracts a specific color component from a given color.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `color_lighten`                |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/color_lighten)                | Lightens a given color by a specific percentage. The percentage must be between 0 and 100.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `color_mix`                    |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/color_mix)                    | Blends two colors together by a specific percentage factor. The percentage must be between 0 and 100.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `color_modify`                 |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/color_modify)                 | Modifies a specific color component of a given color by a specific amount.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `color_saturate`               |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/color_saturate)               | Saturates a given color by a specific percentage. The percentage must be between 0 and 100.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `color_to_hex`                 |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/color_to_hex)                 | Converts a CSS color string to hexadecimal format (`hex6`).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `color_to_hsl`                 |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/color_to_hsl)                 | Converts a CSS color string to `HSL` format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `color_to_oklch`               |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/color_to_oklch)               | Converts a CSS color string to `OKLCH` format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `color_to_rgb`                 |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/color_to_rgb)                 | Converts a CSS color string to `RGB` format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `compact`                      | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/compact)                      | Removes any `nil` items from an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `concat`                       | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/concat)                       | Concatenates (combines) two arrays.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `customer_login_link`          |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/customer_login_link)          | Generates an HTML link to the customer login page.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `customer_logout_link`         |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/customer_logout_link)         | Generates an HTML link to log the customer out of their account and redirect to the homepage.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `customer_register_link`       |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/customer_register_link)       | Generates an HTML link to the customer registration page.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `date`                         | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/date)                         | Converts a timestamp into another date format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `date`                         | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/date)                         | Formats a date according to a specified format string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `default`                      | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/default)                      | Sets a default value for any variable whose value is one of the following: - [`empty`](/docs/api/liquid/basics#empty) - [`false`](/docs/api/liquid/basics#truthy-and-falsy) - [`nil`](/docs/api/liquid/basics#nil)                                                                                                                                    |
| `default_errors`               |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/default_errors)               | Generates default error messages for each possible value of [`form.errors`](/docs/themes/liquid/reference/objects/form#form-errors).                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `default_pagination`           |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/default_pagination)           | Generates HTML for a set of links for paginated results. Must be applied to the [`paginate` object](/docs/api/liquid/objects/paginate).                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `divided_by`                   | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/divided_by)                   | Divides a number by a given number. The `divided_by` filter produces a result of the same type as the divisor. This means if you divide by an integer, the result will be an integer, and if you divide by a float, the result will be a float.                                                                                                       |
| `downcase`                     | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/downcase)                     | Converts a string to all lowercase characters.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `escape`                       | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/escape)                       | Escapes special characters in HTML, such as `&lt;&gt;`, `'`, and `&amp;`, and converts characters into escape sequences. The filter doesn't effect characters within the string that don’t have a corresponding escape sequence.".                                                                                                                    |
| `escape_once`                  | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/escape_once)                  | Escapes a string without changing characters that have already been escaped.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `external_video_tag`           |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/external_video_tag)           | Generates an HTML `&lt;iframe&gt;` tag containing the player for a given external video. The input for the `external_video_tag` filter can be either a [`media` object](/docs/api/liquid/objects/media) or [`external_video_url`](/docs/api/liquid/filters/external_video_url).                                                                       |
| `external_video_url`           |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/external_video_url)           | Returns the URL for a given external video. Use this filter to specify parameters for the external video player generated by the [`external_video_tag` filter](/docs/api/liquid/filters/external_video_tag).                                                                                                                                          |
| `file_img_url`                 |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/file_img_url)                 | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for an image from the [Files](https://www.shopify.com/admin/settings/files) page of the Shopify admin.                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `file_url`                     |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/file_url)                     | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for a file from the [Files](https://www.shopify.com/admin/settings/files) page of the Shopify admin.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `find`                         | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/find)                         | Returns the first item in an array with a specific property value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `find_index`                   | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/find_index)                   | Returns the index of the first item in an array with a specific property value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `first`                        | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/first)                        | Returns the first item in an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `floor`                        | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/floor)                        | Rounds a number down to the nearest integer.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `font_face`                    |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/font_face)                    | Generates a CSS [`@font_face` declaration](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/%40font-face) to load the provided font.                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `font_modify`                  |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/font_modify)                  | Modifies a specific property of a given font.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `font_url`                     |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/font_url)                     | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for the provided font in `woff2` format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `format_address`               |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/format_address)               | Generates an HTML address display, with each address component ordered according to the address's locale.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `global_asset_url`             |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/global_asset_url)             | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for a global asset.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `handleize`                    |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/handleize)                    | Converts a string into a [handle](/docs/api/liquid/basics#handles).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `has`                          | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/has)                          | Tests if any item in an array has a specific property value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `highlight`                    |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/highlight)                    | Wraps all instances of a specific string, within a given string, with an HTML `&lt;strong&gt;` tag with a `class` attribute of `highlight`.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `highlight_active_tag`         |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/highlight_active_tag)         | Wraps a given tag within the [`collection` object](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/objects/collection) in an HTML `&lt;span&gt;` tag, with a `class` attribute of `active`, if the tag is currently active. Only applies to collection tags.                                                                                                      |
| `hmac_sha1`                    |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/hmac_sha1)                    | Converts a string into an SHA-1 hash using a hash message authentication code (HMAC).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `hmac_sha256`                  |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/hmac_sha256)                  | Converts a string into an SHA-256 hash using a hash message authentication code (HMAC).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `image_tag`                    |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/image_tag)                    | Generates an HTML `&lt;img&gt;` tag for a given [`image_url`](/docs/api/liquid/filters/image_url).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `image_url`                    | ☑️ Assay    | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/image_url)                    | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for an image.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `inline_asset_content`         |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/inline_asset_content)         | Outputs the content of an asset inline in the template. The asset must be either a SVG, JS, or CSS file.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `item_count_for_variant`       |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/item_count_for_variant)       | Returns the total item count for a specified variant in the [`cart`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/objects/cart) object.                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `join`                         | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/join)                         | Combines all of the items in an array into a single string, separated by a space.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `json`                         | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/json)                         | Converts a string, or object, into JSON format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `last`                         | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/last)                         | Returns the last item in an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `line_items_for`               |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/line_items_for)               | Returns the subset of [`cart`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/objects/cart) line items that include a specified product or variant.                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `link_to`                      |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/link_to)                      | Generates an HTML `&lt;a&gt;` tag.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `link_to_add_tag`              |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/link_to_add_tag)              | Generates an HTML `&lt;a&gt;` tag with an `href` attribute linking to the current blog or collection, filtered to show only articles or products that have a given tag, as well as any currently active tags.                                                                                                                                         |
| `link_to_remove_tag`           |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/link_to_remove_tag)           | Generates an HTML `&lt;a&gt;` tag with an `href` attribute linking to the current blog or collection, filtered to show only articles or products that have any currently active tags, except the provided tag.                                                                                                                                        |
| `link_to_tag`                  |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/link_to_tag)                  | Generates an HTML `&lt;a&gt;` tag with an `href` attribute linking to the current blog or collection, filtered to show only articles or products that have a given tag.                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `link_to_type`                 |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/link_to_type)                 | Generates an HTML `&lt;a&gt;` tag with an `href` attribute linking to a [collection page](https://shopify.dev/docs/storefronts/themes/architecture/templates/collection) that lists all products of the given product type.                                                                                                                           |
| `link_to_vendor`               |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/link_to_vendor)               | Generates an HTML `&lt;a&gt;` tag with an `href` attribute linking to a [collection page](https://shopify.dev/docs/storefronts/themes/architecture/templates/collection) that lists all products of a given product vendor.                                                                                                                           |
| `login_button`                 |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/login_button)                 | Generates an HTML Button that enables a customer to either sign in to the storefront using their Shop account or follow the shop in the Shop App.                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `lstrip`                       | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/lstrip)                       | Strips all whitespace from the left of a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `map`                          | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/map)                          | Creates an array of values from a specific property of the items in an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `md5`                          |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/md5)                          | Converts a string into an MD5 hash. MD5 is not considered safe anymore. Please use ['blake3'](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/blake3) instead for better security and performance.                                                                                                                                                        |
| `media_tag`                    |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/media_tag)                    | Generates an appropriate HTML tag for a given media object.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `metafield_tag`                |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/metafield_tag)                | Generates an HTML element to host the data from a [`metafield` object](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/objects/metafield). The type of element that's generated differs depending on the type of metafield.                                                                                                                                       |
| `metafield_text`               |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/metafield_text)               | Generates a text version of the data from a [`metafield` object](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/objects/metafield).                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `minus`                        | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/minus)                        | Subtracts a given number from another number.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `model_viewer_tag`             |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/model_viewer_tag)             | Generates a [Google model viewer component](https://modelviewer.dev/) for a given 3D model.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `modulo`                       | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/modulo)                       | Returns the remainder of dividing a number by a given number.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `money`                        | ☑️ Assay    | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/money)                        | Formats a given price based on the store's [**HTML without currency** setting](https://help.shopify.com/manual/payments/currency-formatting).                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `money_amount`                 |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/money_amount)                 | Formats a given price as a plain decimal string, without currency symbols, thousand separators, or locale formatting.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `money_with_currency`          |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/money_with_currency)          | Formats a given price based on the store's [**HTML with currency** setting](https://help.shopify.com/manual/payments/currency-formatting).                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `money_without_currency`       |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/money_without_currency)       | Formats a given price based on the store's [**HTML without currency** setting](https://help.shopify.com/manual/payments/currency-formatting), without the currency symbol.                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `money_without_trailing_zeros` |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/money_without_trailing_zeros) | Formats a given price based on the store's [**HTML without currency** setting](https://help.shopify.com/manual/payments/currency-formatting), excluding the decimal separator (either `.` or `,`) and trailing zeros. If the price has a non-zero decimal value, then the output is the same as the [`money` filter](/docs/api/liquid/filters#money). |
| `newline_to_br`                | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/newline_to_br)                | Converts newlines (`\n`) in a string to HTML line breaks (`&lt;br&gt;`).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `payment_button`               |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/payment_button)               | Generates an HTML container to host [accelerated checkout buttons](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/dynamic-checkout) for a product. The `payment_button` filter must be used on the `form` object within a [product form](/docs/api/liquid/tags/form#form-product).                                                                      |
| `payment_terms`                |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/payment_terms)                | Generates the HTML for the [Shop Pay Installments banner](/themes/pricing-payments/installments).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `payment_type_img_url`         |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/payment_type_img_url)         | Returns the URL for an SVG image of a given [payment type](/docs/api/liquid/objects/shop#shop-enabled_payment_types).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `payment_type_svg_tag`         |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/payment_type_svg_tag)         | Generates an HTML `&lt;svg&gt;` tag for a given [payment type](/docs/api/liquid/objects/shop#shop-enabled_payment_types).                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `placeholder_svg_tag`          |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/placeholder_svg_tag)          | Generates an HTML `&lt;svg&gt;` tag for a given placeholder name.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `pluralize`                    |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/pluralize)                    | Outputs the singular or plural version of a string based on a given number.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `plus`                         | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/plus)                         | Adds two numbers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `preload_tag`                  |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/preload_tag)                  | Generates an HTML `&lt;link&gt;` tag with a `rel` attribute of `preload` to prioritize loading a given Shopify-hosted asset. The asset URL is also added to the [Link header](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Link) with a `rel` attribute of `preload`.                                                                    |
| `prepend`                      | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/prepend)                      | Adds a given string to the beginning of a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `reject`                       | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/reject)                       | Filters an array to exclude items with a specific property value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `remove`                       | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/remove)                       | Removes any instance of a substring inside a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `remove_first`                 | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/remove_first)                 | Removes the first instance of a substring inside a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `remove_last`                  | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/remove_last)                  | Removes the last instance of a substring inside a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `replace`                      | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/replace)                      | Replaces any instance of a substring inside a string with a given string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `replace_first`                | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/replace_first)                | Replaces the first instance of a substring inside a string with a given string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `replace_last`                 | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/replace_last)                 | Replaces the last instance of a substring inside a string with a given string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `reverse`                      | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/reverse)                      | Reverses the order of the items in an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `round`                        | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/round)                        | Rounds a number to the nearest integer.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `rstrip`                       | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/rstrip)                       | Strips all whitespace from the right of a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `script_tag`                   |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/script_tag)                   | Generates an HTML `&lt;script&gt;` tag for a given resource URL. The tag has a `type` attribute of `text/javascript`.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `sha1`                         |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/sha1)                         | Converts a string into an SHA-1 hash. SHA-1 is not considered safe anymore. Please use ['blake3'](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/blake3) instead for better security and performance.                                                                                                                                                    |
| `sha256`                       |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/sha256)                       | Converts a string into an SHA-256 hash. Please use ['blake3'](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/blake3) instead for better security and performance.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `shopify_asset_url`            |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/shopify_asset_url)            | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for a globally accessible Shopify asset.                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `size`                         | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/size)                         | Returns the size of a string or array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `slice`                        | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/slice)                        | Returns a substring or series of array items, starting at a given 0-based index.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `sort`                         | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/sort)                         | Sorts the items in an array in case-sensitive alphabetical, or numerical, order.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `sort_by`                      |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/sort_by)                      | Generates a collection URL with the provided `sort_by` parameter appended. This filter must be applied to the object property [`collection.url`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/objects/collection#collection-url).                                                                                                                              |
| `sort_natural`                 | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/sort_natural)                 | Sorts the items in an array in case-insensitive alphabetical order.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `split`                        | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/split)                        | Splits a string into an array of substrings based on a given separator.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `strip`                        | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/strip)                        | Strips all whitespace from the left and right of a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `strip_html`                   | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/strip_html)                   | Strips all HTML tags from a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `strip_newlines`               | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/strip_newlines)               | Strips all newline characters (line breaks) from a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `structured_data`              |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/structured_data)              | Converts an object into a schema.org structured data format.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `stylesheet_tag`               |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/stylesheet_tag)               | Generates an HTML `&lt;link&gt;` tag for a given resource URL. The tag has the following parameters: \| Attribute \| Value \| \| --- \| --- \| \| `rel` \| `stylesheet` \| \| `type` \| `text/css` \| \| `media` \| `all` \|                                                                                                                          |
| `sum`                          | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/sum)                          | Returns the sum of all elements in an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `time_tag`                     |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/time_tag)                     | Converts a timestamp into an HTML `&lt;time&gt;` tag.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `times`                        | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/times)                        | Multiplies a number by a given number.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `translate`                    |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/translate)                    | Returns a string of translated text for a given translation key from a [locale file](/themes/architecture/locales).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `truncate`                     | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/truncate)                     | Truncates a string down to a given number of characters.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `truncatewords`                | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/truncatewords)                | Truncates a string down to a given number of words.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `uniq`                         | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/uniq)                         | Removes any duplicate items in an array.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `unit_price_with_measurement`  |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/unit_price_with_measurement)  | Formats a given unit price and measurement based on the store's [**HTML without currency** setting](https://help.shopify.com/manual/payments/currency-formatting).                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `upcase`                       | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/upcase)                       | Converts a string to all uppercase characters.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `url_decode`                   | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/url_decode)                   | Decodes any [percent-encoded](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/percent-encoding) characters in a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `url_encode`                   | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/url_encode)                   | Converts any URL-unsafe characters in a string to the [percent-encoded](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/percent-encoding) equivalent.                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `url_escape`                   |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/url_escape)                   | Escapes any URL-unsafe characters in a string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `url_for_type`                 |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/url_for_type)                 | Generates a URL for a [collection page](https://shopify.dev/docs/storefronts/themes/architecture/templates/collection) that lists all products of the given product type.                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `url_for_vendor`               |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/url_for_vendor)               | Generates a URL for a [collection page](https://shopify.dev/docs/storefronts/themes/architecture/templates/collection) that lists all products from the given product vendor.                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `url_param_escape`             |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/url_param_escape)             | Escapes any characters in a string that are unsafe for URL parameters.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `video_tag`                    |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/video_tag)                    | Generates an HTML `&lt;video&gt;` tag for a given video.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `weight_with_unit`             |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/weight_with_unit)             | Generates a formatted weight for a [`variant` object](/docs/api/liquid/objects/variant#variant-weight). The weight unit is set in the [general settings](https://www.shopify.com/admin/settings/general) in the Shopify admin.                                                                                                                        |
| `where`                        | ✅ LiquidJS | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/where)                        | Filters an array to include only items with a specific property value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `within`                       |             | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/within)                       | Generates a product URL within the context of the provided collection.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |

## Deprecated

| Filter               | Status |                                                                      | Description                                                                                                                                                      |
| -------------------- | ------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `article_img_url`    |        | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/article_img_url)    | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for an [article's image](/docs/api/liquid/objects/article#article-image).         |
| `collection_img_url` |        | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/collection_img_url) | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for a [collection's image](/docs/api/liquid/objects/collection#collection-image). |
| `currency_selector`  |        | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/currency_selector)  | Generates an HTML `&lt;select&gt;` element with an option for each currency available on the store.                                                              |
| `hex_to_rgba`        |        | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/hex_to_rgba)        | Converts a CSS color string from hexadecimal format to `RGBA` format. Shorthand hexadecimal formatting (`hex3`) is also accepted.                                |
| `img_tag`            |        | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/img_tag)            | Generates an HTML `&lt;img&gt;` tag for a given image URL.                                                                                                       |
| `img_url`            |        | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/img_url)            | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for an image.                                                                     |
| `product_img_url`    |        | [🔗](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/filters/product_img_url)    | Returns the [CDN URL](/themes/best-practices/performance/platform#shopify-cdn) for a [product image](/docs/api/liquid/objects/product).                          |
